lesson.menu_desc: Prepositions of Place and City Vocabulary -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- Places in the City -- Prepositions of Place and City Vocabulary
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Dienane Brandão de Mesquita | Aula 6 -- Places in the City

listenings.text: Hi Dienane, this is Bruno. I am calling about the new office. It is easy to find. From the bus stop, walk to the corner and turn left. The bank is on the corner. Walk straight for two minutes. The pharmacy is next to the bank, and the supermarket is across from the pharmacy. Our office is between the supermarket and the square. There is a small park in the square, so you cannot miss it. The office is on the second floor. I am at my desk now, so call me when you arrive. See you soon.

Hello, let me tell you about the places near my office. The office is in a quiet street. There is a bank on the corner, and a pharmacy next to the bank. I buy my lunch at the supermarket across from the pharmacy. There is a nice square near the office with a small park. I wait for the bus at the bus stop in front of the square. Everything I need is close, so I walk to work every day. It is a very good place to work.

extra_audio.text: Dienane meets Bruno at the bus stop. They walk to the corner and turn left at the bank. They pass the pharmacy and the supermarket. They find the office between the supermarket and the square. They go up to the office on the second floor.
